description: A black QR code symbol consisting of a square grid of small black modules arranged in a specific pattern, set against a white background, used for encoding and storing information that can be quickly scanned and accessed using a smartphone or other device.
A black QR code symbol consisting of a square grid of small black squares on a white background, used for encoding information such as text, URLs, or other data for easy scanning and decoding.
A black QR code symbol consisting of a square grid of small black modules, arranged in a specific pattern, on a white background, used for encoding and decoding information.

The concept relates to code, symbolized by a simple black bracket on a white background, suggesting programming or coding. This minimalist icon represents the idea of coding or computer programming in a straightforward and recognizable manner.
A file with a folded corner, symbolizing the concept of file code or document classification.
